zh.title: 阿西莫夫预言全集 - 科幻大师对未来世界的16条预言与验证 | Asimov Predictions
zh.description: 俄裔美国科幻大师艾萨克·阿西莫夫（1920-1992）的未来预言完整收录，涵盖机器人、人工智能、视频通话、自动驾驶、在线教育、太空殖民等领域。1964年世博会预言文章中的多项预测已被现实印证。

en.title: Asimov Predictions - 16 Prophecies from the Sci-Fi Master (1920-1992) | Full Archive & Verification
en.description: Isaac Asimov (1920-1992), Russian-American science fiction master and biochemistry professor, left remarkable predictions about robots, AI, video calling, self-driving cars, computerized education, and space colonization. Many predictions from his famous 1964 World's Fair essay have been confirmed by reality.
en.keywords: Isaac Asimov,Asimov predictions,science fiction prophecy,1964 World Fair predictions,Three Laws of Robotics,Foundation series,self-driving cars,artificial intelligence,future predictions
en.ogTitle: Asimov Predictions - The Sci-Fi Master's Complete Prophecies
en.ogDescription: 16 predictions from Isaac Asimov (1920-1992). Full archive with real-world verification covering robots, AI, space, education, and human civilization.
en.twitterDescription: 16 predictions from sci-fi master Isaac Asimov. Verified: video calling, self-driving cars, online education. Based on his 1964 World's Fair essay and novels.
